name: Insta360 X5 360° 8K Camera
description: Upgrade your production to cinematic 360° video with the powerful Insta360 X5 360 Action Camera Motorcycle Multiview Bundle.

features.Key Features:: For Content Creators and Videographers | Includes Motorcycle Mounting Accessories | 8K30/5.7K30 360° PureVideo Recording | 360° Post Reframing, Even Longer Runtime | Rugged Design, Removable Lens Guards | Gesture Control, Dual/Single Lens Modes | Bullet Time, Time-Lapse, InstaFrame | Active HDR, Loop Recording, Me Mode | 49' Waterproof, 72MP Photos | Invisible Selfie Stick Feature
features.Standard Package:: Insta360 X5 360° 8K Camera | 2 x Standard Lens Guard | 2400mAh Battery | Thermo Grip Cover | USB-C Charging Cable | Protective Pouch | Lens Cloth
features.Essential Bundle:: Insta360 X5 360 Action Camera Essentials Bundle | Invisible Selfie Stick (3.7') | 2 x Standard Lens Guard | 2 x 2400mAh Battery | Thermo Grip Cover | Lens Cap | Fast Charge Case | USB-C Charging Cable | Carry Case | Lens Cloth
